info.name: Kanban App API
info.description:
Full API test suite — Auth, Products, Comments, Chat, Notifications, Users, RBAC.

Run order:
1. Auth / Login (Admin) — sets accessToken
2. Products — full CRUD
3. Comments — requires productId
4. Chat, Notifications, Users
5. RBAC — run role logins first, then forbidden tests

exec: pm.expect(j.message).to.equal('Test comment from Postman test suite');

item.name: RBAC — Role Boundary Tests
item.description:
Run the Login requests first to populate role tokens, then run the forbidden tests.

Required accounts:
- employee@test.com / password123
- organiser@test.com / password123
- viewonly@test.com / password123

item.name: Ownership — Employee Cannot Delete Admin Comment (403)

exec: body: {mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({message: 'Admin comment for RBAC test'})}
pm.test('employee cannot delete others comment', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
